code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut seen = "\n"
mut count = 0
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(text, i)
  match b_opt
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        let key = "\n#{cur}\n"
        if not string.contains(seen, key)
          seen = "#{seen}#{cur}\n"
          count = count + 1
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(cur)
  let key = "\n#{cur}\n"
  if not string.contains(seen, key)
    count = count + 1
  end
end
print("unique=#{count}")
